concerns.text: FR-001b requires verifying the Counterfactual dataset schema before execution. The plan.md 'Technical Context' and 'Summary' mention the dataset but lack an explicit task or phase step for this verification gate. The 'research.md' notes a 'Critical Gap' regarding the URL but does not define a plan element to resolve or handle the missing source verification.

FR-005 requires deriving functional roles based on position and frequency, explicitly excluding co-occurrence frequency to prevent multicollinearity. The plan.md 'Methodology' section (3.1) mentions inferring functional role from position but does not explicitly state the exclusion of co-occurrence frequency in the derivation logic, creating a risk of circularity not addressed in the plan steps.

SC-001 requires measuring explanatory power via likelihood-ratio test p-values. The plan.md 'Methodology' (3.2) lists the test but does not explicitly map the output of this test to the success criterion measurement in the 'Evaluation' phase or 'report.py' description, leaving the measurement traceability ambiguous.
